description: A financial account — wallet, bank account, or internal ledger account tracked by Ophan. Balances are stored as strings to preserve precision.

context_schema.currency: string — ISO 4217 currency code or ticker symbol
context_schema.provider: string? — exchange, bank, or institution name (e.g. Coinbase, Chase)
context_schema.balance: string? — current balance as a decimal string
context_schema.last_synced_at: string? — ISO 8601 timestamp of last balance sync

ui.label: Account
ui.description: Financial account — wallet, bank account, or ledger tracked by Ophan.
